content.en:
The robber beast of the twenty-eighth tribulation, Ye Tian can kill it by himself, naturally he will not cooperate with other invincible people, otherwise he will also score benefits to other invincible people.

Therefore, on this day, he sent the replica body and the invincible ancestor clone into this exotic world called the dovetail crane.

Dove crane world.

Ye Tian descended here and immediately attacked this beast.

Thundered!!!

The battle broke out, and Ye Tian besieged this twenty-eight tribulation beast with the combat power of the two invincibles, and the strength of the copy body was the strongest, and the invincible ancestor clone was the weakest.

Although the doppelganger is good and does not occupy the quota of the copy body, it is equivalent to an individual, and it needs to be practiced by itself, and there is no way to be as powerful as the body like the copy body.

Of course, it is also good to have one more doppelganger.

Although Ye Tian's strength was stronger than this robber beast, it was very limited, so it took a long time to besiege this robber beast, and even copy the body at all costs, severely injuring this robber beast again and again.

In the end, the replica body collapsed and fell, but this robber beast was also on the verge of death, and was immediately killed by Ye Tian's clone.

This belongs to one for one, which is naturally not cost-effective for ordinary people, but Ye Tian doesn't care about the death of this replica body, anyway, he just pays the price of some resources.

In fact, if Ye Tian was careful, it would be impossible for the copy body to fall, after all, the strength of the copy body was stronger than this robbing beast.

However, Ye Tian didn't want to waste time, in case the Great Tribulation Time of the Dove Crane Heaven and Earth passed, he would not be able to kill this Tribulation Beast, and he would need to wait for another Great Tribulation Time.

So.

He will take this life-by-life approach and end the battle quickly.

Click!!

The body of the Twenty-Eight Tribulation Tribulation Beasts disintegrated, turning into a large number of Origin Rule Tribulation Beasts, Blood Tribulations, and Bone Tribulations.

80,000 origin rules robbed crystals, ten robbed blood, and six robbed bones.

Although the value of the blood robbery and the value of the bones were not as good as the Thirty-Seven Tribulation Beasts, the value of these resources was still very high, and it was much greater than the gains that Ye Tian had obtained by killing the Thirty-Seven Tribulation Beasts before.

After all, the harvest this time is all owned by him.

Ye Tian took these things, and even the corpses of the robbing beasts were all taken away, and returned to the Dark Forbidden Domain.

......

"Hahaha, the harvest is too big, it's better to hunt beasts alone!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

However, his strength is limited now, and he can only kill the weaker robbers, and once he encounters a powerful beast, he can't kill them anyway.

However, this harvest was too great, enough for his strength to advance a little further, maybe it would be comparable to the two invincible Ancestors of the Dragon Calamity and the Ten Thousand Yuan Sword Ancestors.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to absorb and refine the ten tribulation blood, although the effect of each blood tribulation was not as good as the blood tribulation of the thirty-seven tribulation beasts, but there were a lot of them!

As the blood of the Tribulation was consumed and refined, Ye Tian's cultivation was rapidly improving, and his strength was slowly increasing.

Finally, a long time passed, and all ten tribulation bloods were refined.

And at this time, Ye Tian also felt the shackles in the underworld, if he couldn't comprehend an invincible ancestral technique and change the quality of his physical body, he wouldn't be able to quickly improve his cultivation.

In other words, at his current level, he can only go to the Eternal Heaven and Earth to comprehend the rules of heaven and earth there, trying to comprehend an invincible ancestral technique.

"It's time to go to the Eternal Heaven and Earth, my current strength is not weaker than that of the Dragon Calamity Ancestor, which is equivalent to stepping into the threshold of the combat power of a fifth-rank invincible, but it is not a real fifth-rank invincible. "

Ye Tian muttered.

However, before heading to the Eternal Heaven and Earth, he wanted to learn some about the situation of the Eternal Heaven and Earth from the forces of the Firmament Sword Tomb.

Although the Firmament Sword Tomb had destroyed the second-order gate that connected to the Dark Forbidden Domain, Ye Tian knew which exotic world the Firmament Sword Tomb was in.

After all, he knew the location of countless exotic worlds nearby, and naturally he also knew the location of those six super-name-level forces.

In fact, there are not only six super-name-level forces in the Exotic Realm near here, but many of them, such as the Blood Mist Alliance, which is also one of the super-name-level forces.

However, Ye Tian did not contact other super-name-level forces, and only contacted these six super-name-level forces for the time being.

this day.

Ye Tian came into contact with a base of the Firmament Sword Tomb through another exotic world, but did not directly enter the heaven and earth of the Firmament Sword Tomb, otherwise it would be tantamount to declaring war with the Firmament Sword Tomb.

"I'm looking for your Ten Thousand Yuan Sword Ancestor of the Firmament Sword Tomb!"

Ye Tian said.

The strongest men of the Firmament Sword Tomb immediately went to inform the Firmament Sword Grave headquarters, and soon an invincible person descended on this base.

This invincible person is not the Ten Thousand Yuan Sword Ancestor, but another invincible person of the Firmament Sword Tomb, the Ten Directions Sword Ancestor.

The Ten Directions Sword Ancestor was also one of the invincible people who cooperated with Ye Tian to besiege and kill the robbery beast last time, and his strength was not very strong, but his aura was a little stronger than the last time, but it was not very powerful.

After all, the other invincible people were not as fast as Ye Tian absorbing the refining tribulation power, so even if the Ten Directions Sword Ancestor obtained the tribulation blood, the refining speed was slow, and the degree of utilization was not high, so it was impossible for his strength to increase all of a sudden.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws!"

Shifang Sword Ancestor said politely.

"Ten Fang Sword Ancestor, isn't the Ten Thousand Yuan Sword Ancestor here?" Ye Tian asked casually.

"No!" Shifang Sword Ancestor said: "Ten Thousand Yuan Sword Ancestor has left the Sky Sword Tomb and gone to the Eternal World, at his level, it is difficult to improve his strength, and he must comprehend an invincible sword technique before he can transform his strength." Last time, he obtained the Blood and Bone Robbery, so he went to the Eternal Heaven and Earth to sell them in exchange for treasures that would help him, so as to try to comprehend the invincible sword technique. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

It is difficult to improve the cultivation of the 10,000 Yuan Sword Ancestor, refining and robbing blood is a waste, so sell it directly, this is the best choice.

"Ten Directions Sword Ancestor, I want to know about the situation of the Eternal Heaven and Earth, such as the route and some situations in the Eternal Heaven and Earth, I wonder if the Firmament Sword Tomb can be told?" Ye Tian asked.

The Ten Directions Sword Ancestor said with a smile: "Ten Thousand Law Ancestors, whether it is in the Eternal Heaven and Earth, or in the major exotic worlds, they all pay attention to the principle of equivalent trading, if you want to obtain information, you must pay a certain amount of treasure, otherwise our Sky Sword Tomb will not give any information!"

Ye Tian didn't bother to talk to the Ten Directions Sword Ancestor, besides, he was invincible now, and he couldn't do anything to capture the strongest person in the Firmament Sword Tomb and thus threaten the Ten Directions Sword Ancestor, it would be too cheap.

So, Ye Tian chose to pay some Origin Rule Robbery Crystals to buy intelligence.

In the end, Ye Tian paid 3,000 Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, and obtained a road map to the Eternal Heaven and Earth from the Ten Directions Sword Ancestor, as well as some specific information about the Eternal Heaven and Earth, and even included some forces in the Eternal Heaven and Earth and precautions.

For Ye Tian, it was naturally worth it to use the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal to buy this information.
